hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,os;cmd=json.load(sys.stdin)['tool_input']['command'].strip();cwd=os.getcwd().replace(os.sep,'/').lower();unix='/'+cwd[0]+cwd[2:];cl=cmd.lower().replace(os.sep,'/');msg='Never prepend cd to commands.' if cmd.startswith('cd ') or cmd=='cd' else 'Use relative paths, not absolute.' if cwd in cl or unix in cl else '';(print(msg+' Working directory is already '+os.getcwd()+'.',file=sys.stderr) or sys.exit(2)) if msg else sys.exit(0)"
python3 -c "import sys,json; from pathlib import Path; Path('.claude/hooks/notifications/last_active').write_text(json.loads(sys.stdin.read()).get('prompt',''))"
